mapper.sql: id , type, code, name, standard_type, expiration_date, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark, standard_status, release_date, implementation_date,pid
mapper.insert: insert into test_standard_file (id, type, code, name, standard_type, expiration_date, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark, standard_status, release_date, implementation_date, file_url,pid) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{standardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expirationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{standardStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{implementationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},#{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into test_standard_file_record (id, type, code, name, standard_type, expiration_date, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark, standard_status, release_date, implementation_date, file_url,pid) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{standardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expirationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{standardStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{implementationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},#{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update test_standard_file
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
standard_type = #{standardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expiration_date = #{expirationDate,jdbcType=DATE},
status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
standard_status = #{standardStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
release_date = #{releaseDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
implementation_date = #{implementationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_standard_file set type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, standard_type = #{standardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expiration_date = #{expirationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, standard_status = #{standardStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, release_date = #{releaseDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, implementation_date = #{implementationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
